reasoning: Koren, we need to address your poor lactate clearance and build your aerobic base. Your last ride was light, so you’re ready to tackle this challenge. This workout will simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop's key climb by improving fatigue resistance and power sustainability over extended durations.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of Over-Unders: 4 min @ 242-256W, 4 min @ 201-218W, repeat x3; 3 min easy spin in between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
